dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9269 IH: Renewing the African American Civil Rights Network Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Clyburn (for himself, Mr. Carey, Ms. Sewell, Mr. Fleischmann, Mr. Davis of Illinois, Mr. Fitzpatrick, Mr. Bell, Mr. Cohen, and Mr. McCormick) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources

form.official-title: To extend the authorization of the African American Civil Rights Network.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Renewing the African American Civil Rights Network Act.

Section 308404 of title 54, United States Code, is amended by striking 7 years after the date of enactment of this chapter and inserting 10 years after the date of the enactment of the Renewing the African American Civil Rights Network Act.
